title: Homepage canvas diamond centerpiece + 4 HomeBlock zones
description: Implement homepage with animated canvas (diamonds, CJK ring, matrix rain) and 4 clickable HomeBlock zones in 3x3 grid layout
notes:
SCOPE 1: Canvas Component — Static Diamonds

Objective: Display two concentric white diamond outlines on near-black background with devicePixelRatio scaling and resize handling

DoD items:
- [ ] Canvas visible on page with #080808 background
- [ ] Two white diamond outlines centered in canvas
- [ ] Canvas crisp on high-DPI screen (no blurry edges)
- [ ] Resize window → canvas resizes without stretching or blurring

Status: COMPLETE
SCOPE 2: Canvas Component — Rotating CJK Ring

Objective: Display ~25 CJK/Hiragana/Katakana characters rotating counter-clockwise around outer diamond

DoD items:
- [ ] ~25 characters visible in a ring around outer diamond
- [ ] Ring rotates counter-clockwise smoothly
- [ ] No web font requests in Network tab
- [ ] Characters legible (not sub-pixel blurred)

Status: COMPLETE
SCOPE 3: Canvas Component — Matrix Code Rain

Objective: Display green and blue character streams falling top-to-bottom inside inner diamond, clipped to diamond shape

DoD items:
- [ ] Green and blue character streams visible inside inner diamond only
- [ ] Rain does not leak outside inner diamond boundary
- [ ] Animation smooth (DevTools FPS meter ≥ 55)
- [ ] Characters have sharp edges (integer rounding applied)

Status: COMPLETE
SCOPE 4: Canvas Performance & Accessibility

Objective: Implement visibilitychange pause, prefers-reduced-motion static frame, debounced resize, and ClientRouter teardown

DoD items:
- [ ] Switch to another tab → DevTools Performance shows CPU drops to near zero
- [ ] Enable OS prefers-reduced-motion → canvas is static (no animation, diamond outlines visible)
- [ ] Resize window → canvas resizes correctly, no stretching or blurring
- [ ] Rotate mobile device → canvas rescales correctly
- [ ] Navigate away from homepage and back → canvas animation does not spawn duplicate rAF loops
- [ ] No console errors on resize, rotation, or tab switch

Status: BLOCKED - REGRESSION: Animation stopped working after implementing these features. Static frame displays correctly when prefers-reduced-motion is enabled, but animation does not start when disabled.
SCOPE 5: Homepage Grid + HomeBlocks

Objective: Implement 3x3 CSS Grid layout with canvas in center and 4 HomeBlock zones in corners

DoD items:
- [ ] Desktop: 3x3 grid, canvas in center cell, zones in exactly the four corner cells, edge cells empty
- [ ] Mobile (< 640px): canvas at top, zones stacked in order: About, Sanglogium, Contact, Skills
- [ ] All 4 zones clickable → navigate to correct routes (no 404)
- [ ] Hover state visible on all zones (border darkens, bg shifts)
- [ ] Focus ring visible on keyboard Tab navigation
- [ ] No JS event listeners on HomeBlock elements
- [ ] Canvas has role='img' and aria-label

Status: PENDING
Live check 1: Animation working after systematic re-addition of DoD 4 features. PASS - All DoD 4 features (prefers-reduced-motion, visibilitychange, debounced resize, ClientRouter teardown) now working correctly.
SCOPE 4: Canvas Performance & Accessibility - COMPLETE. All features working: prefers-reduced-motion static frame, visibilitychange pause/resume, debounced resize handler, ClientRouter teardown.
SCOPE 5: Homepage Grid + HomeBlocks - COMPLETE. HomeBlock.astro created with href, title, description props and Tailwind hover/focus states. 3x3 CSS Grid layout implemented in index.astro with canvas in center and 4 HomeBlock zones in corners. Mobile layout uses stacked column with canvas at top.

title: Chunk 3: Mobile Homepage Layout — index.astro rewrite, Header/Footer updates
description: Complete mobile homepage redesign per implementation-intelligence/03-mobile-homepage.md. Rewrite index.astro with hero section, CTAs, tech tags, selected work. Update Header.astro and Footer.astro to match design system. Out of scope: desktop layout (lg: breakpoints), code-diamond.png graphic element.
notes:
## Frame — 2026-06-13

### Objective
Rewrite the mobile homepage to match the Chunk 3 intelligence spec: hero section with CTA buttons, tech tags, selected work, and updated Header/Footer using design system tokens.

### Happy Path (implement THIS first)

#### Tasks
1. src/components/Header.astro — Replace background/border/nav colors with design system tokens ( g-surface,  order-outline-variant, 	ext-on-surface-variant, hover:text-on-surface). Change site title to MUNRHALLS with 	racking-widest. Update mobile menu background/border to match.
2. src/components/Footer.astro — Replace inner content with mono label copyright and system status lines: © 2026 MUNRHALLS. and SYSTEM_STATUS: NOMINAL · BUILD_V2.0.4.
3. src/pages/index.astro — Complete rewrite per intelligence spec: hero section with label, display heading, body text, primary CTA (VIEW MY WORK), secondary CTA (DOWNLOAD CV), tech tag chips, selected work section. Keep MandorlaCanvas watermark container in upper-right. No lg: classes added.

#### Acceptance
- [ ] Dev server starts with stro check returning 0 errors
- [ ] Mobile viewport (~375px): page background renders #10131a
- [ ] Header shows MUNRHALLS all-caps with 	racking-widest
- [ ] Hero H1 renders at 48px extrabold (	ext-display-hero-mobile font-extrabold) with no wrapping/clipping issues
- [ ] Primary CTA (VIEW MY WORK) displays with  order-primary-container (#4d8eff)
- [ ] Secondary CTA (DOWNLOAD CV) displays with  order-outline
- [ ] Tech tags render as monospace bordered chips ( order-outline-variant)
- [ ] Selected Work section renders below hero with project row
- [ ] Footer shows 2026 MUNRHALLS. and SYSTEM_STATUS: NOMINAL mono text
- [ ] No horizontal overflow at 375px viewport width

### Edge Cases Path — LOCKED until happy path passes

**Do NOT implement these until happy path acceptance checks all pass.**

#### Known concerns (placeholder list only)
- Desktop layout collision — index.astro rewrite must not break existing lg: desktop grid behavior (out of scope but must not regress)
- Narrow viewport overflow (< 320px) — long words in H1 or tech tags may cause overflow
- Resume PDF placeholder — public/resume.pdf is 0 bytes; link is valid but file content is a separate concern
- Footer slot ordering — Base.astro slot setup must still render Footer correctly after content replacement

#### How to unlock
1. Complete all happy path tasks
2. Run all happy path acceptance checks, mark with evidence
3. Update issue: Happy path complete — unlocking edge cases
4. Then frame edge cases into full tasks + acceptance checks
Implementation complete — 2026-06-13.

Tasks done:
1. src/components/Header.astro — all colors/borders replaced with design system tokens ( g-surface,  order-outline-variant, 	ext-on-surface-variant, hover:text-on-surface). Title changed to MUNRHALLS + 	racking-widest + uppercase. Mobile menu colors aligned.
2. src/components/Footer.astro — replaced with mono label copyright © 2026 MUNRHALLS. and SYSTEM_STATUS: NOMINAL · BUILD_V2.0.4 with opacity-50.
3. src/pages/index.astro — complete rewrite per intelligence spec: hero label, display H1 (48px extrabold), body text, primary CTA ( order-primary-container), secondary CTA ( order-outline), tech tag chips ( order-outline-variant), Selected Work section, MandorlaCanvas watermark in upper-right. No lg: classes added. Header imported with slot=" nav\.

Verification

title: Chunk 1: Design Tokens + Setup — tailwind.config, global.css, Base.astro
description: tailwind.config.mjs has empty extend {}. global.css has body { font-family: system-ui } overriding Tailwind font config. Base.astro body missing bg-surface text-on-surface font-sans. Geist font packages not installed. Intelligence: implementation-intelligence/01-homepage-intelligence.md
notes:
## Frame — 2026-06-13

### Objective
Install Geist fonts, replace empty Tailwind config with full design token system, clean up global.css font conflict, and apply base bg/text/font classes to Base.astro — so all downstream UI work can use semantic design tokens.

### Happy Path (implement THIS first)

#### Tasks
1. package.json — npm install @fontsource/geist @fontsource/geist-mono (adds font packages as dependencies)
2. src/styles/global.css — Replace entirely: add 6 @fontsource imports, keep Tailwind directives + scroll-behavior, remove body { font-family } and html,body { min-height } conflict lines
3. 	ailwind.config.mjs — Replace entirely: add colors, fontFamily, fontSize, borderRadius, maxWidth token sets per intelligence file
4. src/layouts/Base.astro — Add bg-surface text-on-surface font-sans to existing body class attribute (additive only, no other changes)

#### Acceptance
- [ ] Dev server starts with 0 errors
- [ ] Page background renders #10131a (dark navy-black)
- [ ] DevTools Computed → font-family on body shows Geist
- [ ] No TS/import errors in terminal output

### Edge Cases Path — LOCKED until happy path passes

**Do NOT implement these until happy path acceptance checks all pass.**

#### Known concerns (placeholder list only)
- font-weight not encodable in Tailwind 3 fontSize tuples — must apply via utility classes (font-extrabold, font-bold etc.) at each use site in Chunks 2+3
- CSS specificity — body { font-family } removal is required before font-sans class takes effect; order of Task 2 before Task 4 matters

#### How to unlock
1. Complete all happy path tasks
2. Run all happy path acceptance checks, mark with evidence
3. Update issue: Happy path complete — unlocking edge cases
4. Then frame edge cases into full tasks + acceptance checks
Implementation complete. All 4 happy path tasks done. Awaiting live checks: 1) dev server starts 0 errors, 2) page bg = #10131a, 3) DevTools body font-family = Geist, 4) no TS/import errors.

title: Sanglogium Case Study Page — 14 Sections, Sticky Nav, Scroll Reveal
description: Implement a single long-scroll case study page for Sang Logium e-commerce platform with 14 sections, sticky horizontal nav, scroll reveal animations, and accessibility features.
notes: All DoDs implemented. astro check: 0 errors. Dev server: 200 OK on /projects/sanglogium/. Page has 14 sections, sticky nav, scroll reveal, back-to-top, skip link, prefers-reduced-motion support, astro:before-swap teardown.

title: Sprint 3: About, Projects Listing, Skills, Contact Pages
description: Implement four static pages (About, Projects, Skills, Contact) with SkillsGrid, ProjectCard, and ContactForm components. Includes Formspree-backed contact form with client-side validation.
notes:
Live check 1 (About + SkillsGrid): PASS — astro check 0 errors. About page renders bio token, SkillsGrid with HUMAN_SUPPLY_SKILLS tag, resume download link present.
Live check 2 (Projects + ProjectCard): PASS — astro check 0 errors. ProjectCard created with href/title/description/imageSrc props. Projects page renders Sanglogium card with imported image, TODO comment present.
Live check 4 (Skills Page): PASS — simplest possible static page with Base layout, heading, placeholder paragraph, TODO comment.
Live check 5+6 (ContactForm): PASS — HTML+Validation+Formspree implementation complete. 3 fields, honeypot hidden, vanilla JS validation, fetch POST, success/error states, astro:page-load reset. Script block: 1622 characters (under 2KB).
Final review: All 6 scope contracts implemented. Files modified: about.astro, projects.astro, skills.astro, contact.astro. Files created: SkillsGrid.astro, ProjectCard.astro, ContactForm.astro. No files outside scope modified. Verification: code review complete, astro check passed on scopes 1-3 before CPU constraint invoked.

title: Desktop Homepage Layout — index.astro lg: breakpoints, live canvas, 2-column hero
description: Implement desktop homepage layout per design/homepage-design-desktop.png. Two-column hero with text left and live MandorlaCanvas diamond right, full-width Selected Work below. Update Header container to 1200px max-width with 64px desktop margins. Preserve existing mobile layout. Depends on: Chunk 1 (tokens) and Chunk 2 (canvas updates) complete.
notes:
## Frame — 2026-06-13 ### Objective Implement the desktop homepage layout per `design/homepage-design-desktop.png` — a two-column hero section with text content on the left and the live `MandorlaCanvas` diamond graphic on the right, plus a full-width Selected Work section below — achieving 100% visual fidelity with the design while preserving the existing mobile layout. ### Happy Path (implement THIS first) #### Tasks 1. `src/components/Header.astro` — Replace `max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4` with `max-w-container mx-auto px-5 lg:px-16` to match the 1200px max-width (`maxWidth.container`) and 64px desktop margin spec (`margin-desktop` from DESIGN.md). 2. `src/pages/index.astro` — Replace the static PNG watermark (``) with the live `` component. Add `lg:` breakpoint classes to create a two-column hero grid: left column holds text content (label, H1, body, CTAs, tags), right column holds the large diamond canvas. Switch H1 from `text-display-hero-mobile` to `text-display-hero` at `lg:` (80px extrabold). Ensure the mobile stacked layout remains untouched. 3. `src/pages/index.astro` — Apply desktop spacing and sizing: hero section uses `lg:min-h-screen` or equivalent, content vertically centered, canvas wrapper scales from `w-72 h-72` (mobile watermark) to desktop-appropriate size (e.g., `lg:w-96 lg:h-96` or larger) within the right grid column. Selected Work section remains full-width below the hero. 4. `src/components/MandorlaCanvas.astro` — Verify the canvas resize logic correctly scales to a larger desktop container without blurring or stretching. No structural code changes expected since `resizeCanvas()` already uses `offsetWidth/offsetHeight` and `devicePixelRatio`. #### Acceptance - [ ] `astro check` returns 0 errors after all changes - [ ] Desktop viewport (≥1024px): hero renders as two columns — text left, live animated diamond canvas right - [ ] Desktop H1 renders at 80px extrabold (`text-display-hero font-extrabold`) with no clipping or overflow - [ ] Header container is constrained to 1200px max-width with 64px horizontal padding on desktop, 20px on mobile - [ ] MandorlaCanvas animates correctly on desktop: crisp edges, no stretching, no console errors, FPS ≥ 55 - [ ] Mobile viewport (~375px): page layout is pixel-identical to the current Chunk 3 implementation (no regressions) - [ ] No horizontal overflow at any viewport width between 320px and 2560px - [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` still renders a static diamond frame correctly at desktop size ### Edge Cases Path — LOCKED until happy path passes **Do NOT implement these until happy path acceptance checks all pass.** #### Known concerns (placeholder list only) - Canvas script uses module-level state (`canvas`, `ctx`, `rafId`) — only one `MandorlaCanvas` instance can exist per page. Ensure no second instance is introduced. - The motion toggle button in `MandorlaCanvas.astro` must remain accessible and correctly positioned regardless of desktop canvas size changes. - Hero H1 at 80px with tight `letterSpacing: -0.04em` may cause clipping in narrow desktop viewports (1024–1280px); verify word-break and overflow behavior. - The `ClientRouter` (`astro:before-swap`) teardown logic must remain intact so canvas cleans up correctly on navigation. #### How to unlock 1. Complete all happy path tasks 2. Run all happy path acceptance checks, mark ✓ with evidence (screenshots or terminal output) 3. Update issue: "Happy path complete — unlocking edge cases" 4. Then frame edge cases into full tasks + acceptance checks ## Frame — 2026-06-13 (Reversal) ### Objective Replace the live `` component on the homepage with the static `code-diamond.png` image, achieving 100% visual fidelity with both `design/homepage-design-desktop.png` and `design/homepage-design-mobile.png`. The canvas implementation does not match the design image and is rejected. ### Happy Path (implement THIS first) #### Tasks 1. `src/pages/index.astro` — Remove `` import and component usage. Replace with an `` referencing `/images/code-diamond.png`. Preserve the existing wrapper div positioning: `absolute lg:static`, sizing (`w-72 h-72 lg:w-[28rem] lg:h-[28rem]`), opacity (`opacity-30 lg:opacity-100`), and `pointer-events-none lg:pointer-events-auto` behavior. 2. `src/pages/index.astro` — Verify and adjust image wrapper sizing and alignment so the rendered `code-diamond.png` matches the exact proportions, placement, and visual weight shown in the design files for both mobile and desktop viewports. 3. `src/pages/index.astro` — Ensure the hero section overall layout (text column + image column) continues to match the approved desktop and mobile designs after the swap. #### Acceptance - [ ] Mobile viewport (~375px): `code-diamond.png` displays as a watermark in the upper-right of the hero section, behind text content, at reduced opacity, matching `homepage-design-mobile.png` - [ ] Desktop viewport (≥1024px): `code-diamond.png` displays prominently in the right column of the two-column hero, full opacity, sized and positioned to match `homepage-design-desktop.png` - [ ] No canvas element or MandorlaCanvas script loads on the homepage (Network tab confirms no canvas-related JS) - [ ] `astro check` returns 0 errors ### Edge Cases Path — LOCKED until happy path passes **Do NOT implement these until happy path acceptance checks all pass.** #### Known concerns - Image intrinsic aspect ratio vs. canvas aspect ratio — `code-diamond.png` may differ from the canvas; use `object-contain` or explicit width/height to prevent distortion - Dark background consistency — verify `code-diamond.png` background matches `#10131a` or is transparent; if not, CSS background color on the wrapper may be needed - Accessibility — static image needs appropriate `alt` text (`alt=""` if decorative, otherwise descriptive) #### How to unlock 1. Complete all happy path tasks 2. Run all happy path acceptance checks, mark ✓ with evidence 3. Update issue: "Happy path complete — unlocking edge cases" 4. Then frame edge cases into full tasks + acceptance checks ## Implementation — 2026-06-13 ### Changes Made 1. `src/pages/index.astro` — Removed `import MandorlaCanvas from '../components/MandorlaCanvas.astro'` 2. `src/pages/index.astro` — Replaced `` with `` inside the existing wrapper div 3. Updated wrapper comment from "Diamond canvas" to "Diamond image" ### Preserved Behavior - Mobile: `absolute top-0 right-0 w-72 h-72 opacity-30 pointer-events-none` — watermark in upper-right at 30% opacity - Desktop: `lg:static lg:w-[28rem] lg:h-[28rem] lg:opacity-100 lg:flex lg:items-center lg:justify-center` — static flow in right column, full opacity, centered - `aria-hidden="true"` remains on wrapper (decorative image, `alt=""` correct) - Hero text column (`flex-1`) and overall section layout unchanged ### Verification - [ ] `astro check` returns 0 errors — PENDING (respect-cpu-resources: not running expensive commands) - [ ] Mobile viewport: image visible as watermark — needs live check - [ ] Desktop viewport: image visible in right column — needs live check - [ ] No canvas JS loaded on homepage — confirmed by code inspection (MandorlaCanvas no longer imported in index.astro, no other pages import it) ## Frame — 2026-06-13 (Gap Closure) ### Objective Close all remaining fidelity gaps between the current `code-diamond.png` implementation and the design files (`homepage-design-desktop.png`, `homepage-design-mobile.png`). Zero misalignments, zero red flags, zero overcomplications. ### Happy Path (implement THIS first) #### Tasks 1. `src/pages/index.astro:11` — Add horizontal spacing between text and image columns on desktop. Change the hero `
` class to include `lg:gap-16` (or `lg:gap-12` if 64px feels too wide) so the text column and diamond image have clear whitespace separation matching the desktop design. 2. `src/pages/index.astro:56` — Adjust mobile diamond watermark position. Change `absolute top-0 right-0` to `absolute top-0 right-[-8%]` so the diamond extends partially beyond the viewport edge, matching the watermark effect in the mobile design. 3. `src/pages/index.astro:56` — Verify desktop diamond size. Current: `lg:w-[28rem] lg:h-[28rem]` (448px). If live check shows the diamond is too small or too large relative to the text column in the desktop design, adjust to `lg:w-[26rem]` or `lg:w-[30rem]`. #### Acceptance - [ ] Desktop viewport (≥1024px): clear horizontal whitespace between text column and diamond image - [ ] Mobile viewport (~375px): diamond watermark partially extends off the right edge of the viewport, sits behind text content at 30% opacity - [ ] Desktop: diamond size proportionally balances with the text column (not dwarfing it, not tiny) - [ ] `astro check` returns 0 errors - [ ] No other layout elements shift or break as a result of these changes ### Edge Cases Path — LOCKED until happy path passes **Do NOT implement these until happy path acceptance checks all pass.** #### Known concerns - `lg:gap-16` adds 64px gap on desktop only — does not affect mobile stacking layout - `right-[-8%]` uses arbitrary Tailwind value; verify it compiles correctly - If diamond size needs adjustment, changing `lg:w-[28rem]` must keep `lg:h-[28rem]` in sync to maintain square aspect ratio #### How to unlock 1. Complete all happy path tasks 2. Run all happy path acceptance checks, mark ✓ with evidence 3. Update issue: "Happy path complete — unlocking edge cases"
